Title: Get subject group observations
Steps:
- Connect to a VM inside the VPC via SSH to use the Python Client
[US er-prod-us]
gcloud compute ssh warehouse-test-us --zone=us-west1-b --project=er-reporting-prod
- Navigate to /home/dev directory
- Activate the virtual env source .venv/bin/activate
execute the script 
[Subject data latam-ops]
python test_dwh_client.py --server latam-ops.pamdas.org --token 5WaYWDMSLxILfumhtyoQihuMQjQVvW --since 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z --until 2026-03-27T00:00:00Z -- subject-observations --subject-group "Subjects"
